insight:

With only 5,650 steps and no formal training, you burned 2,389 calories while keeping stress incredibly low at just 22/100. Your 47 bpm resting heart rate shows excellent cardiovascular fitness, and 7.2 hours of sleep provided solid recovery time.

Your HRV of 108ms sits perfectly within your baseline range of 93-116ms, indicating your nervous system is well-recovered and ready for action. Combined with that low stress score and excellent resting heart rate, this green-lights whatever training you have planned for today. No modifications needed - your body is primed and race-ready with just 5 days to go.

Given yesterday's lower activity level, focus on hitting your full 2,300 calorie target today with quality carbs to top off glycogen stores. Add an extra serving of rice or oats to fuel today's session properly.
